posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

There should be a Workflow Builder block for “if column text = xyz”.

What are you trying to achieve

There are times when you need to know whether a specific text column is equal to or contains or doesn’t include (etc) specific parameters. This functionality would greatly help.
